{{Quote|Do you really take me for the kind of mother who would lock her children in a pantry?|Tamora Spice|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Tamora Spice''' was the second [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Kitster Chanchani Banai|Kitster Banai]] and mother of [[Ji Banai|Ji]] and [[Elly Banai]]. After Kitster stole the painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' during the auction held at [[Mawbo's Performance Hall]], she, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] went to search for Kitster.<ref name="TG" />

==Skills and abilities==
{{Quote|Tamora was my best mixer. A pity she had to steal my man.|Ulda on Tamora Spice|<ref name="TG" />}}
Tamora Spice was a capable [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]], and even though [[Ulda]] harbored resentment toward her for marrying her ex-husband, she continued to acknowledge Spice as her best mixer.<ref name="TG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{1st}}
